calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Protective Order And Order To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas Served By Plaintiff Capital Funding Group, Inc; Appendix
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER RONALD SILVA, FILLMORE CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC. AND DRUMM CORPORATION'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Protective Order And Order To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas Served By Plaintiff Capital Funding Group, Inc.
This matter will be heard on the discovery calendar at 9:00 am. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Petitioner Ronald Silva, Fillmore Capital Partners, Llc, Drumm Corp. Petition For Protective Order And Order To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas Served By Plaintiff Capital Funding Group, Inc
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Jennifer Levin, Esq., appearing for Capital Fundig Group. Lily A. North, Esq., appearing for Petitioners Silva Filmore Capital Partners, Drumm. Petitioner Ronald Silva, Fillmore Capital Partners, Llc, Drumm Corp. Petition For Protective Order And Order To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas Served By Plaintiff Capital Funding Group, Inc.
After argument of respective counsel court ordered Motion for protective order denied. Court instructed counsel to prepare an order and include in the form of order any issues that the parties agree to present to the court in reference to motion for protective order. Judge: James Watson, Judge Pro Tem. Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (302)
